scripts.init: bun run up && bun run init:hooks
scripts.test: emacs -Q --batch -l vcupp.el -l vcupp-batch.el -l vcupp-native-comp.el -l vcupp-install-packages.el -l test/test.el -f ert-run-tests-batch-and-exit
scripts.test:all: emacs -Q --batch -l vcupp.el -l vcupp-batch.el -l vcupp-native-comp.el -l vcupp-install-packages.el -l test/test.el --eval "(setq my-test-run-live-tests t)" -f ert-run-tests-batch-and-exit
scripts.test:live: emacs -Q --batch -l vcupp.el -l vcupp-batch.el -l vcupp-native-comp.el -l vcupp-install-packages.el -l test/test.el --eval "(setq my-test-run-live-tests t)" --eval "(ert-run-tests-batch-and-exit '(tag :live))"
scripts.up: mise use -g bun@latest && mise install && bun install
